channel.title: Prog on My Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Prog on My Blog

item.title: Projects
item.description:
• SimpleMath - a package with simple mathematical functions, containing various implementation methods and written using the built-in Python3 library

  • QuickPass - the simplest password generator with a console interface, written using the built-in Python3 library

item.title: What I Use
item.description:
Hardware

  • Silent PC Modern 14 - C12M
  • Silent Mobile Phone Phillips Xenium X170

Software

  • Windows 10 as the primary OS
  • Obsidian for notes
  • Git Bash and Power shell for command-line utilities
  • Neovim and VSCodium for text and code editing
  • Excel with PowerQuery for working with data
  • Hugo for blogging
  • Anki for learning English
  • Torrent for music, films, and sometimes books
  • KeepassXC for storing passwords
  • Gnupg and VeraCrypt for encryption
  • Photoshop CS6 for image editing
  • Firefox and Tor Browser for internet access

Services

  • GitHub for hosting
  • Alice GPT as an AI assistant
